jdk.incubator.vector/VectorShape/valueOf.name: valueOf
jdk.incubator.vector/VectorShape/valueOf.description: Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.

info.excerpt: Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.

jdk.incubator.vector/Float16/valueOf.name: valueOf
jdk.incubator.vector/Float16/valueOf.description: Returns aFloat16value rounded from thedoubleargument using the round to nearest rounding policy.

info.excerpt: Returns aFloat16value rounded from thedoubleargument using the round to nearest rounding policy.

jdk.incubator.vector/VectorShape/values.name: values
jdk.incubator.vector/VectorShape/values.description:
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in
the order they are declared.

info.excerpt:
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in
the order they are declared.

jdk.incubator.vector/VectorSpecies<E>/ve.name: vectorBitSize
jdk.incubator.vector/VectorSpecies<E>/ve.description:
Returns the total vector size, in bits, of any vector
of this species.

info.excerpt:
Returns the total vector size, in bits, of any vector
of this species.

jdk.incubator.vector/VectorShape/vectorB.name: vectorBitSize
jdk.incubator.vector/VectorShape/vectorB.description: Returns the size, in bits, of vectors of this shape.

info.excerpt: Returns the size, in bits, of vectors of this shape.

jdk.incubator.vector/VectorSpecies<E>/ve.name: vectorByteSize
jdk.incubator.vector/VectorSpecies<E>/ve.description:
Returns the total vector size, in bytes, of any vector
of this species.

jdk.incubator.vector/VectorSpecies<E>/ve.name: vectorShape
jdk.incubator.vector/VectorSpecies<E>/ve.description:
Returns the shape of vectors produced by this
species.

info.excerpt:
Returns the shape of vectors produced by this
species.

jdk.incubator.vector/VectorMask<E>/vecto.name: vectorSpecies
jdk.incubator.vector/VectorMask<E>/vecto.description: Returns the vector species to which this mask applies.

info.excerpt: Returns the vector species to which this mask applies.

jdk.incubator.vector/VectorShuffle<E>/ve.name: vectorSpecies

jdk.incubator.vector/VectorSpecies<E>/ve.name: vectorType

jdk.incubator.vector/Vector<E>/viewAsFlo.name: viewAsFloatingLanes
jdk.incubator.vector/Vector<E>/viewAsFlo.description:
Views this vector as a vector of the same shape, length, and
contents, but a lane type that is a floating-point type.
